# Fired by Your Bankruptcy Lawyer? - Know Your Rights [2026]
> Bankruptcy lawyer withdrew or fired you mid-case? Know your rights to fee refunds, your case file, and how to find replacement counsel. Free 2026 guide.

## About
firedbymybankruptcylawyer.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Fee Disputes After Attorney Withdrawal in Bankruptcy: https://firedbymybankruptcylawyer.com/fee-disputes.html
- Finding New Bankruptcy Counsel After Withdrawal: https://firedbymybankruptcylawyer.com/finding-new-counsel.html
- Fired by Your Bankruptcy Lawyer FAQ - Next Steps and Rights: https://firedbymybankruptcylawyer.com/frequently-asked-questions.html
- Fired by Your Bankruptcy Lawyer? - Know Your Rights: https://firedbymybankruptcylawyer.com/
- What to Do When Your Bankruptcy Attorney Withdraws: https://firedbymybankruptcylawyer.com/next-steps.html
- Continuing Your Bankruptcy Case Pro Se: https://firedbymybankruptcylawyer.com/pro-se-options.html
- Why Bankruptcy Attorneys Withdraw from Cases: https://firedbymybankruptcylawyer.com/why-attorneys-withdraw.html
- Privacy Policy: https://firedbymybankruptcylawyer.com/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org

Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
